About

Where Support Meets Sales

I design and operate customer-facing systems that drive both satisfaction and revenue. From cold outreach in Apollo.io to ticket resolution in Zendesk, from HubSpot pipeline architecture to Zapier automations — I build for measurable outcomes, not just activity.

🎯

Pipeline design, deal staging, contact management, call logging, activity timelines, and revenue reporting.

Ticket forms, SLA policies, macros, multi-channel resolution, intent tagging, and customer communication.

Apollo.io Outbound
Lead sourcing, ICP filtering, verified email prospecting, sequence building, and campaign scheduling.
⚡
Zapier Automation
Multi-step Zap creation connecting Google Forms, HubSpot, Gmail, and Trello in a single workflow.
📋
Trello
Board setup, card automation from Zapier triggers, task tracking, and team workflow management.

Zendesk · Bwealth's Beauty & Luxury

Customer Support — Live Ticket Resolutions

Built a complete Zendesk helpdesk environment — custom forms, SLA policies, macros, and five distinct ticket types resolved live. Each screenshot below is from the real Zendesk interface.

Ticket #3 · Via Email
✓ Solved
Unable to Reset Password
Resolved Raymond Wesley's login issue with a 4-step password reset guide. Macro applied. Submitted as Solved. Intent auto-tagged: software_login_issues_password.
Ticket #4 · Via Web Form
⏳ Pending
Order Delayed
Confirmed Sarah Johnson's order is in transit with a 2–3 business day ETA. Empathetic reply sent. Status set to Pending pending courier update.
Ticket #5 · Via Web Form
● In Progress
Wrong Item Delivered
Confirmed incorrect item for Amina Bello. Authorised free replacement shipment with no return required. Internal note: send return instructions. Status: In Progress.
Ticket #6 · Via Web Form
◎ Open
Refund Status
Confirmed Chloe Martins' refund processed. Provided 5–7 business day bank timeline. Reason for return: paid twice for same product. Note set to follow up.
Ticket #7 · Via Web Form
✓ Solved
Product Inquiry
Responded to Linda Perez's ingredient concern with a warm, brand-aligned message. Invited further contact. Marked Solved immediately.
🏆
100% Resolution Rate
All 5 tickets responded to within SLA targets. Every customer received a professional, empathetic, brand-consistent reply. Zero escalations.

Zendesk System Configuration

Forms · Macros · SLA Policy

Ticket Forms
5 active ticket forms built: Customer Support (default), Order Issue, Return & Refunds, New Form, and Product Inquiry — each with tailored fields for routing and reporting.
Agent Macros
Built reusable macros including Password Reset Instructions (dynamic {{ticket.requester.name}} merge tags) and Return Instructions — available to all agents across every ticket.
SLA Policy
Configured first reply targets: Urgent 13m · High 21m · Normal 41m · Low 59m. Total resolution: 24h across all priority levels. Fully active on all ticket forms.

Zapier · Trello · Automation

4-Step Workflow — Google Forms to CRM

Built and published a multi-step Zapier automation that instantly processes every form submission — creating a HubSpot contact, sending a Gmail confirmation, and generating a Trello task card, all without manual input.

1
Google Forms
Trigger: New Form Response
2
HubSpot — Create Contact
Maps Email, Name, Job Title, Company, Phone, Product
3
Gmail — Send Email
Automated confirmation to respondent
4
Trello — Create Card
Task card with full customer details on board

Zapier Workflow — Published & Live

Zapier · 4-Step Automation Published
